hero.title: Discover your child's hidden talents
hero.subtitle: An AI mentor that turns curiosity into real creations in just 7 days.

problem.body: Kids are full of ideas, but one-size-fits-all curriculums and limited access to mentors mean their unique interests rarely get to grow.

stats.donutAria: children struggle to find their true interest
stats.leftCaption: children struggle to find their true interest

step1.title: Talent discovery
step1.body: Upload a photo of your creation

talentScout.title: Talent Scout
talentScout.body: Upload a photo of your creation

closing.title: Ready to spark your child's talent?

errors.required: Please enter your email and password

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.general: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Empowering children to discover, act, and connect.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: Oops! The page you are looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something Went Wrong
error.description: Oops! Something unexpected happened. Don't worry, you can try again or go back to the home page.

discover.title: Discover Your Talents
discover.subtitle: Upload a drawing, photo, or record your voice to discover your unique talents!

flowSelection.title: How would you like to share?
flowSelection.uploadArtifactDesc: Share a drawing, painting, photo, or any creative work
flowSelection.recordAudioDesc: Tell us about your interests, sing, or share a story
flowSelection.storyModeDesc: See pictures and create an amazing story about them

upload.dropzone: Drag and drop your image here
upload.clickToUpload: or click to select a file
upload.networkError: Upload failed. Please check your connection and try again.

errors.invalidType: Unsupported file type. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP
errors.tooLarge: File too large. Maximum size: 10 MB
errors.multipleFiles: Please upload one file at a time

errors.permissionDenied: Microphone access is needed to record. Please allow microphone access in your browser settings and try again.
errors.unsupported: Audio recording is not supported in your browser. Please try uploading an audio file instead.
errors.invalidType: Unsupported audio format. Accepted formats: MP3, WAV, M4A
errors.tooLarge: Audio file too large. Maximum size: 5 MB

history.title: Your Discoveries
history.empty: You haven't made any discoveries yet. Start your first one!

sessionRecovery.title: Resume Upload?
sessionRecovery.message: You have an unfinished upload. Would you like to continue?

analysis.loadingSubtext: Our AI is looking for your unique talents and interests!
analysis.errorGeneral: Oops! We couldn't analyze your creation right now.
analysis.errorTimeout: The analysis is taking a bit too long. Let's try again!
analysis.errorNetwork: It seems you're not connected. Please check your internet and try again.
analysis.errorHint: Don't worry, your upload is safe. Just tap the button to try again!
analysis.lowConfidence: We're still learning about your unique talents! Keep creating and exploring — every piece helps us understand you better.
analysis.contentBlocked: Let's try creating something different! How about drawing your favorite animal or a magical world?

results.shareCopied: Link copied! Share it with your parents.
results.shareError: Could not copy the link. You can copy the URL from the address bar.
results.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find this discovery. It may have been removed.

history.title: Your Discoveries
history.subtitle: Look at all the amazing talents you've found!
history.emptyDesc: Start your first discovery to uncover your amazing talents. Upload a drawing, record your voice, or tell a story!

story.imagePromptSubtitle: Create a story inspired by what you see
story.textPlaceholder: Once upon a time, there was a...
story.audioInstructions: Record yourself telling a story about what you see in the pictures above!

validation.tooShort: Your story needs at least {min} characters. Keep going, you're doing great!
validation.tooLong: Your story is too long! Maximum {max} characters.

new.title: Create Your Quest
new.subtitle: Tell us about your dream and where you live, and we'll create a personalized 7-day mission plan just for you!
new.noTalents: Complete a discovery first to detect your talents!
new.dreamPlaceholder: I want to build robots that help people...
new.dreamHelp: Tell us what you dream of doing or becoming. Be specific!
new.contextLabel: Tell Us About Where You Live
new.contextPlaceholder: I live in a village near a river. We have farms and a small market...
new.contextHelp: This helps us suggest activities and materials available near you.
new.generatingSubtext: Our AI is designing 7 amazing days of adventure just for you!

validation.dreamTooShort: Your dream needs at least {min} characters. Tell us more!
validation.dreamTooLong: Your dream is too long! Maximum {max} characters.
validation.contextEmpty: Please tell us about where you live!
validation.contextTooShort: Your description needs at least {min} characters. Tell us more!
validation.contextTooLong: Your description is too long! Maximum {max} characters.

error.general: Oops! We couldn't create your quest right now.
error.timeout: Quest creation is taking a bit too long. Let's try again!
error.network: It seems you're not connected. Please check your internet and try again.
error.hint: Don't worry, your dream and context are saved. Just tap the button to try again!

new.success: Quest created! Let's begin your adventure!
new.noDiscoveryDesc: Before creating a quest, you need to discover your talents. Upload a drawing, record your voice, or tell a story!

list.title: Your Quests
list.subtitle: Track your 7-day adventure quests!
list.emptyDesc: Complete a talent discovery first, then create your first 7-day quest adventure!
list.noDiscoveryDesc: Before starting a quest, you need to discover your talents. Upload a drawing, record your voice, or tell a story!

overview.title: Your Quest
overview.subtitle: Your 7-day mission plan
overview.lockedMessage: Complete the previous day first to unlock this mission!
overview.selectMission: Select a day from the timeline to see mission details
overview.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find this quest. It may have been removed.
overview.questCompletedDesc: Amazing job! You've completed all 7 days of your quest!
overview.readOnlyBanner: This quest has been completed. You can review your missions below.
overview.startMissionDesc: Ready to begin? Click to start this mission!
overview.completeMissionDesc: Finished? Upload your proof photo to complete!
overview.missionInProgress: Mission in progress! Complete it when you're done.
overview.proofPhotoRequired: Upload a photo of your work to complete this mission
overview.confirmCompleteDesc: Are you sure you want to complete this mission? You cannot undo this.
overview.startError: Could not start the mission. Please try again.
overview.completeError: Could not complete the mission. Please try again.
overview.confirmAbandonDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel this quest? Your progress will be lost and you can start a new discovery.
overview.abandonError: Could not cancel the quest. Please try again.
overview.abandonSuccess: Quest cancelled. You can start a new discovery!

complete.title: Quest Complete!
complete.selectBestWorkDesc: Choose your favorite proof photo to showcase in the gallery!
complete.previewDesc: This is how your work will appear in the gallery.
complete.submitSuccess: Your work has been added to the gallery!
complete.submitError: Could not submit to gallery. Please try again.
complete.notReadyDesc: Complete all 7 missions first to see the celebration!
complete.journeySummary: You completed a 7-day quest to pursue your dream!
complete.encouragement: You showed amazing dedication and creativity. Keep dreaming big!
complete.celebrationAnnouncement: Congratulations! You have completed your quest!

mentor.chatSubtitle: Your thinking companion for this mission

adjustment.title: Small Adjustment
adjustment.description: Let's try a simpler approach — real engineers do this all the time!
adjustment.applied: Mission instructions updated with simpler steps
adjustment.limit: Maximum adjustments reached for this mission

reflection.title: Daily Reflection
reflection.subtitle: Share what you learned today!
reflection.textPlaceholder: What did you enjoy most about today's mission? What did you learn?
reflection.success: Reflection saved! Great job thinking about your learning!
reflection.alreadyExists: You already shared a reflection for this day
reflection.encouragement: Every great creator takes time to think about what they learned!

gallery.title: Global Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Explore works by talented children around the world!

filter.label: Filter by Talent

clusters.subtitle: Works grouped by talent and region

squads.error: Could not load squads. Please try again.
squads.empty: No squads available yet. Complete quests to join talent squads!

map.noEntries: No works yet — complete a quest to showcase your talent on the world map!
map.webglFallback: Your browser doesn't support interactive maps. Here are the gallery works in a grid view instead.
map.entryCount: {count, plural, one {# work} other {# works}} on the map

detail.notFoundDesc: This work could not be found. It may have been removed.
detail.flagSuccess: Thank you for reporting. Our team will review this content.
detail.flagError: Could not submit report. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Parent Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your child's progress and get mentoring tips
dashboard.noChildrenHint: Enter your child's access code to see their progress here.
dashboard.reportError: Failed to generate report. Please try again.

createChild.title: Add New Child
createChild.description: Create a profile for your child. You can enter their name to identify them.
createChild.errorDefault: Could not create child profile. Please try again.

claim.title: Link Your Child
claim.description: Enter the access code your child uses to sign in. This links their profile to your account.
claim.errorDefault: Could not link child. Please check the code and try again.

reports.title: Progress Reports
reports.noChildSelected: No child selected. Go back to the dashboard first.
reports.noReports: No reports yet. Generate your first report!
reports.generateError: Failed to generate report. Please try again.

moderation.title: Content Moderation
moderation.subtitle: Review flagged and blocked content
moderation.empty: No moderation events to review. All clear!

forbidden.title: Access Denied
forbidden.description: You don't have permission to access this page.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.stub: Your privacy is important to us. Katalis is designed with children's safety in mind. We collect minimal data, never sell personal information, and comply with COPPA regulations. Parents can request data deletion at any time.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.stub: By using Katalis, you agree to use the platform responsibly. Content must be appropriate for children ages 6-12. We reserve the right to moderate and remove content that violates our community guidelines.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.stub: Have questions, feedback, or need support? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to our team and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

badges.title: Your Badges
badges.subtitle: Badges you've earned on your creative journey!
badges.empty: No badges yet — keep exploring to earn your first one!

week_warrior.name: Week Warrior
week_warrior.description: Completed all 7 days of a quest!

reflector.name: Reflector
reflector.description: Took time to reflect on your learning

deep_thinker.name: Deep Thinker
deep_thinker.description: Reflected on 3 or more days in a quest

trailblazer.name: Trailblazer
trailblazer.description: Asked the Quest Buddy for help

creative_adapter.name: Creative Adapter
creative_adapter.description: Found a new way to approach a challenge

persistent_explorer.name: Persistent Explorer
persistent_explorer.description: Kept going even when it was tough
